final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing cover image for a WeChat public article about a new fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: high-end luxury editorial, refined texture aesthetic
Composition: centered composition, title prominently featured
Subject: fragrance new product launch — "染秋香氛新品发布"
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title text must be visually dominant; aspect ratio 900×500 (16:9 landscape)
Avoid:
